# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to the **Termux Command Encyclopedia**.

Please complete the checklist below before submitting.

---

# Description

Describe what this pull request does.

Example:

Added documentation for the `cut` command.

---

# Type of Change

Please check the relevant option.

- [ ] New command documentation
- [ ] Improved explanation
- [ ] Added examples
- [ ] Documentation fix
- [ ] Formatting improvement

---

# Files Changed

List files you modified.

Example:

commands/C.md

---

# Checklist

Before submitting please confirm:

- [ ] I followed the documentation format
- [ ] I added at least one example
- [ ] Markdown formatting is correct
- [ ] File is placed in the correct alphabetical section

---

# Additional Notes

Add any extra information if necessary.
